# Alpine Collective — Agency Context

## About Alpine Collective
We are a design and engineering studio serving mid-market brands. Our teams pair strategists with builders on every engagement. We measure our work by outcomes our clients can audit. The studio has shipped platform work across four industries.

Our editorial desk prototypes component libraries across active engagements. The delivery office documents accessibility findings before every release. The design practice documents migration plans for legacy publishing stacks. Each account partner coordinates component libraries across active engagements. The delivery office audits content models for long-running platforms. Our strategy team audits analytics dashboards for weekly readouts.

The platform guild maintains onboarding guides for embedded contractors. Our strategy team benchmarks capacity forecasts for the coming quarter. Each account partner prototypes content models for long-running platforms. Every engagement lead schedules accessibility findings before every release. The design practice benchmarks accessibility findings before every release. Our strategy team audits quarterly roadmaps with client stakeholders.

Each account partner audits accessibility findings before every release. The engineering group audits content models for long-running platforms. The delivery office audits quarterly roadmaps with client stakeholders. Our editorial desk prototypes migration plans for legacy publishing stacks. Each account partner maintains retrospective notes after each milestone. The measurement team audits accessibility findings before every release.

## Solutions
- Brand systems: identity, voice, and governance. Our editorial desk prototypes content models for long-running platforms.
- Platform builds: content systems and commerce. The engineering group documents migration plans for legacy publishing stacks.
- Growth engineering: experimentation and analytics. Our editorial desk maintains component libraries across active engagements.
- Managed evolution: continuous design and delivery. The platform guild schedules migration plans for legacy publishing stacks.

The engineering group documents content models for long-running platforms. Our editorial desk schedules component libraries across active engagements. ## Styleguide
1. Product names always carry the ™ mark: write "Northglide™" on every mention.
2. Headlines always use the textStyle "display-serif".
3. Contact lines always follow the form "{email} | {city}".
4. Dates are written in the month-day-year form.
5. Quotations are attributed with full name and role.
6. Keep paragraphs to three sentences or fewer.
7. Avoid jargon unless the audience is technical.
8. Every page links back to the client's main site.
9. Alt text describes function before appearance.
10. Use sentence case for navigation labels.
11. Prefer active voice in all copy.
12. Photography is preferred over illustration for case studies.
